action.reasoning: Observation: New best 0.594 (from iter11's 0.5889), with replay(500/task)+KD(0.5/2.0)+consol(5eps) giving balanced task accs (early~0.48, late~0.7-0.8), val~0.596 matching test; dense logs now work (many steps/epochs). Analysis: Replay+KD+final consolidation on full buffer effectively mitigates forgetting vs early naive runs (~0.02); current RN18+adapt+pretrain solid but early tasks still lag (t0=0.475), larger memory and tuned KD/consol can push avg>0.61. Curves show proper training dynamics. Decision: Update full clean train.py (memory=1000/task for ~100/cls balanced, epochs/task=7, KD beta=0.65 T=2.5, consol=8eps@1e-4, Adam(4e-4 wd=1e-5) with per-task scheduler reset+CosineAnnealing, best-val checkpointing, dense logging every 20 steps). Keep model.py/predict.py. Run training then submit_eval targeting >0.60.
